statement.en: Millimeter-scale Physical Disturbances at the Soil-Water Interfaces Alter Carbon Dioxide and Methane Emission

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Paper dated 2026-04-25 (future date, likely preprint or provisional). Claims millimeter-scale soil-water interface disturbances affect CO₂/CH₄ emissions—plausible mechanistically but requires empirical validation. No abstract provided to assess evidentiary basis. Categorized as provisional/under-change pending peer review and experimental confirmation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 微細な撹乱が界面の傾斜を急峻にし、ガス放出を二乗で増幅させるさま。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 水の波面（界面）の微細な皺が、見えない気体の放出を誘発する微小の泉。
